parts.text: I have the transaction ID and passcode handy and can give it when you’re ready.
Here’s my transaction ID along with the passcode to confirm the transaction.
I want to provide the transaction number for assistance with my payment.
My transaction ID is ready for you to process the verification.
I’m calling to give my transaction ID so you can pull up my account details.
Can I share the transaction ID and passcode to verify my order status?
I have my transaction ID available and can give it to the agent now.
I’d like to provide my transaction ID for follow-up on my recent transaction.
My transaction ID and password are with me; can we proceed?
I’m ready to give my transaction ID for the service I recently used.
Can I provide my transaction ID now to get assistance with my request?
I have the transaction ID and passcode; please guide me on where to submit it.
Here’s my transaction number and passcode to verify the account activity.
I want to provide the transaction ID for the purchase I made earlier.
I’m calling from a store and I have the transaction ID ready for you.
Can you confirm that you need my transaction ID and passcode before I provide it?
I have a transaction ID for the recent order I placed.
My transaction ID and passcode are ready, please let me know how to submit them.
I can provide the transaction ID now if you’re ready to process it.
Hi, I want to give my transaction ID and passcode to get an update.
I have the transaction number ready; can I provide it for verification?
Here’s my transaction ID and password for the transaction I completed.
I’d like to share my transaction ID and passcode to verify the request.
Can I give you the transaction ID associated with my recent payment?
I have my transaction ID and passcode ready, can I provide it now?
